response.original_title: Hard Knocks: The Rise of Davy
response.overview: Davy's the new kid at the strange and infamous school of Hard Knocks, and he quickly is forced to adapt to the new school after being "initiated" by the current class president: Kane. Wanting to make a difference, Davy steps up to fight the student council in attempts to become the new class president.
response.tagline: "A lawless land, where the motto reigns supreme; STRENGTH IS ABSOLUTE!"
response.title: Hard Knocks: The Rise of Davy

results.name: Hard Knocks: The Rise of Davy - Loften Film Festival 2018
